ownerDirective.summary: Make the open-knowledge /ask agent run a GENUINE reasoning loop (decompose -> gather each side -> reconcile -> synthesize the verdict), falling back to honest salvage only when synthesis is genuinely impossible. This is the model-comparison + structured-reasoning spec that 084 unblocked after 084 empirically DISPROVED that gemma4:26b reasons once unshackled. Wire a reasoning model on the synthesis turn (deepseek-r1:7b dev/self-hosted; deepseek-r1:32b opt-up), strip <think>, structure the forced-final prompt, retry-before-salvage. Preserve ALL spec-064 trust invariants. Do NOT touch spec-083 card-rewards WIP. Do NOT commit/push (devops owns the live re-verify).
